message:
Fix NaN bug and heredoc edge case in CLI and web

- registry.ts: Fix formatAge returning "NaN days ago" for malformed dates
- PromptContent.tsx: Use SKILL_EOF delimiter to avoid heredoc collisions
- not-found.tsx: Harmonize "Back to prompts" text for consistency

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
